title: Golden Globes 2026: The full list of winners
text: Golden Globes 2026: The full list of winners. Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy: Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'. The 83rd Golden Globes ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, from the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills. Nikki Glaser hosted the ceremony, which aired on CBS and Paramount+ With Showtime. Rose Byrne's win marked her first Golden Globe award. She defeated nominees including Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked: For Good'), Kate Hudson ('Song Sung Blue'), Chase Infiniti ('One Battle After Another'), Amanda Seyfried ('The Testament of Ann Lee'), and Emma Stone ('Bugonia'). The award reflects recognition for Byrne's performance in the psychologically intense film about a mother in crisis, which was shot on a minimal budget but received significant critical acclaim.
